title: A fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire sparks market relief — but no clear path to lasting peace
summary_full: The fragile ceasefire agreement is likely to face significant challenges, analysts told CNBC, citing a significant trust deficit on both sides.
summary_public: The fragile ceasefire agreement is likely to face significant challenges, analysts told CNBC, citing a significant trust deficit on both sides.
